messages.content: Hello, Are the prices on the demos negotiable?
That's something our team will need to review — let me get the right person involved and they'll follow up with you shortly.
You're welcome! If you have any more questions or need assistance, feel free to ask.
Thank you for reaching out! If you have any questions in the future, don't hesitate to ask. Have a great day!
Is someone else going to enter the chat to answer my question?
Yes, I'm connecting you with our team now. They'll be able to provide you with the information regarding demo prices.
Ok great. I didnt know what to expect. Lol
No problem at all! It's completely normal to have questions about the process. Our team will reach out shortly to assist you with your inquiry about demo prices. Thank you for your patience!
